name: devops
description: Ops-focused agent for deployment, CI/CD, and infrastructure — verify before deploy, maintain tooling, automate everything
author: meetsoma
notes: working-style v1.1.0 includes 'verify after ship' and 'maintain the tools' — critical for ops. pre-flight catches before you deploy something that already exists. Higher auto-detect bump (2) because ops patterns are high-signal. safe-file-ops starts hot — ops can't afford accidental deletes or overwrites.
